query: Vietnam population 2024 General Statistics Office official data
answer: Vietnam's population in 2024 was approximately 102.3 million. The General Statistics Office projected a slight increase for 2025. The latest official data is for 2024.

results.title: Vietnam Population, 1955 – 2025 | CEIC Data
results.snippet: Vietnam Population reached 102.3 million people in Dec 2025, compared with the previously reported figure of 101.3 million people in Dec 2024.
